pr.title: Record: Sliding Window + FP16 Embed + 10L + Muon WD + Overtone Init (val_bpb=1.1748)

output.summary: Combines sliding-window scoring, FP16 tied embeddings, Muon with decoupled weight decay, and spectral+residual inits to support a 10-layer config.
techniques: Sliding-window eval (stride 64) with compiled forward_logits for full-context scoring
FP16 tied embeddings plus Muon optimizer with decoupled weight decay
Spectral overtone init and sigmoid residual mixing to stabilize 10-layer model
